# to-words

> Convert numbers and currency amounts into words across 124 locales.
> Production-ready with BigInt, ordinals, TypeScript, ESM/CJS/UMD, and zero runtime dependencies.

- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/to-words
- GitHub: https://github.com/mastermunj/to-words
- Demo: https://mastermunj.github.io/to-words/
- License: MIT

## Installation

```bash
npm install to-words
```

## Quick Start

```js
// Class API
import { ToWords } from 'to-words';

const tw = new ToWords({ localeCode: 'en-US' });
tw.convert(12345); // "Twelve Thousand Three Hundred Forty Five"
tw.convert(1234.56, { currency: true });
// "One Thousand Two Hundred Thirty Four Dollars And Fifty Six Cents Only"
tw.toOrdinal(21); // "Twenty First"

// Functional API (full bundle)
import { toWords, toOrdinal, toCurrency } from 'to-words';

toWords(12345, { localeCode: 'en-US' });
toOrdinal(21, { localeCode: 'en-US' });
toCurrency(1234.56, { localeCode: 'en-IN' });

// Functional API auto-detects locale when localeCode is omitted
toWords(12345);

// Per-locale import (tree-shakeable)
import { toWords as enWords, toOrdinal as enOrdinal, toCurrency as enCurrency } from 'to-words/en-US';

enWords(12345);
enOrdinal(21);
enCurrency(1234.56);
```

## Public Exports

From `to-words`:

- `ToWords` class
- `toWords(number, options?)`
- `toOrdinal(number, options?)`
- `toCurrency(number, options?)`
- `detectLocale(fallback?)`
- `setLocaleDetector(fn | null)`
- `LOCALES`
- `DefaultConverterOptions`
- `DefaultToWordsOptions`

From `to-words/<locale>` (for every locale code):

- `ToWords` class pre-configured to that locale
- `toWords(number, options?)`
- `toOrdinal(number, options?)`
- `toCurrency(number, options?)`

## Functional API Behavior

- Full-bundle functional helpers auto-detect locale when `localeCode` is omitted.
- Helper calls are cached per locale (one shared `ToWords` instance per locale).
- Auto-detection source order: custom detector (`setLocaleDetector`) -> `navigator.language` -> `Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().locale`.

## Input Types

- `number`
- `bigint`
- `string` (numeric)

For ordinals, the numeric value must be a non-negative integer.

## Converter Options

| Option | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `currency` | boolean | false | Convert as currency |
| `ignoreDecimal` | boolean | false | Ignore fractional part |
| `ignoreZeroCurrency` | boolean | false | Skip zero main currency unit |
| `doNotAddOnly` | boolean | false | Omit `Only` suffix |
| `includeZeroFractional` | boolean | false | Include zero fractional unit for string inputs like `"123.00"` |
| `currencyOptions` | object | locale default | Override locale currency settings |
| `gender` | `'masculine' | 'feminine'` | locale default | Grammatical gender where supported |
| `useAnd` | boolean | locale default | Insert locale `and` before trailing sub-hundred segment |
| `formal` | boolean | false | Formal numerals where supported (e.g. zh-CN/zh-TW) |

## CLI

```bash
npx to-words 12345
npx to-words 12345 --locale en-US
npx to-words 1234.56 --locale en-US --currency
npx to-words 21 --locale en-US --ordinal
npx to-words --detect-locale
```

## Bundle Sizes

| Import | Raw | Gzip |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Full bundle (all 124 locales) | 654 KB | 60 KB |
| Single locale (e.g. `to-words/en-US`) | 12 KB | 3.5 KB |

## Performance (Apple M2, Node.js 23)

| Operation | Throughput |
| --- | --- |
| Small integers (42) | ~4.7M ops/sec |
| Medium integers (12,345) | ~2.2M ops/sec |
| Large integers (15 digits) | ~700K ops/sec |
| Currency conversion | ~1M ops/sec |
| BigInt (30+ digits) | ~225K ops/sec |

## Runtime Compatibility

- Node.js 20+
- Deno
- Bun
- Cloudflare Workers
- Modern browsers (ESM + UMD)

## Supported Locales (124)

af-ZA, am-ET, ar-AE, as-IN, ar-LB, ar-MA, ar-SA, az-AZ, be-BY, bg-BG, bn-BD, bn-IN, ca-ES, cs-CZ, da-DK, de-AT, de-CH, de-DE, ee-EE, el-GR, en-AE, en-AU, en-BD, en-CA, en-GB, en-GH, en-HK, en-IE, en-IN, en-JM, en-KE, en-LK, en-MA, en-MM, en-MU, en-MY, en-NG, en-NP, en-NZ, en-OM, en-PH, en-PK, en-SA, en-SG, en-TT, en-TZ, en-UG, en-US, en-ZA, en-ZW, es-AR, es-CL, es-CO, es-ES, es-MX, es-US, fa-IR, fi-FI, fil-PH, fr-BE, fr-CA, fr-CH, fr-FR, fr-MA, fr-SA, gu-IN, ha-NG, hbo-IL, he-IL, hi-IN, hr-HR, hu-HU, id-ID, ig-NG, is-IS, it-IT, ja-JP, jv-ID, ka-GE, kn-IN, ko-KR, lt-LT, lv-LV, ml-IN, mr-IN, ms-MY, ms-SG, nb-NO, nl-NL, nl-SR, np-NP, or-IN, pa-IN, pl-PL, pt-AO, pt-BR, pt-MZ, pt-PT, ro-RO, ru-RU, sk-SK, sl-SI, sq-AL, sr-RS, sv-SE, sw-KE, sw-TZ, ta-IN, te-IN, th-TH, tr-TR, uk-UA, ur-PK, vi-VN, yo-NG, yue-HK, zh-CN, zh-TW, es-VE, uz-UZ, my-MM, si-LK, km-KH, zu-ZA

## Error Behavior

- Unknown locale: `Error: Unknown Locale "xx-XX"`
- Invalid numeric input (`NaN`, `Infinity`, empty/non-numeric string): `Error: Invalid Number "..."`
- Ordinal input must be non-negative integer value.
